title: Vanilla Revamp
description: Taking the vanilla game to new heights
body:
Vanilla Revamp is a modpack that increases the performance of Minecraft, while adding useful functionality.

Some mods have altered configurations to work better with other mods, or just to fit better in Vanilla Revamp. The default Minecraft configuration has been altered to remove the default tutorial, the accessibility menu opening on first start, and not showing the default multiplayer warning.

### Notice
Users of this modpack are expected to already know where to find the accessibility menu and that servers are not owned, operated or supervised by Mojang/Microsoft.
